references.text: Grey-Wilson, C. 1980. Impatiens in Papuasia: Studies in Balsaminaceae I, Kew Bulletin 34: 661-668.
Grey-Wilson, C. 1989. A revision of Sumatran Impatiens: Studies in Balsaminaceae: VII. Kew Bulletin 44: 67-106.
Hooker, JD. 1909. A review of the known Philippine Islands species of Impatiens. Bulletin of Miscellaneous Information (Royal Gardens, Kew) 1909: 281-289.
Shimizu, T. 1970. Contributions to the flora of southeast Asia II: Impatiens of Thailand and Malaya. South East Asian Studies 8: 187-217

species.citation: Hook.f. , Bull. Misc. Inform. Kew 1909 (1909) 284 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 518; Type: FB 3367 Ahern’s collector (NY, US, iso), Luzon: Rizal, Bosoboso, Sep-1905.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Rizal.
species.notes: In shaded places on or about limestone cliffs at low and medium elevation.

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 938 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 307; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 518.
species.notes: Cultivated in all warm countries. Cultivated. Fairly common in cultivation in different forms, sometimes occurring as an escape in waste places.

species.citation: Lindl. , Edwards's Bot. Reg. 32 (1846) t.68. = Impatiens hutchinsonii Hook.f. , Bull. Misc. Inform. Kew 1909 (1909) 283 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 520. = Impatiens montalbana Hook.f. , Bull. Misc. Inform. Kew 1909 (1909) 285 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 520, as ‘montalbanica’; Type: Loher 1652 (US, syn), Luzon: Rizal, Monte de la cueva de Montalban, 26-Oct-1890; Merrill 6235 (NY, syn), Luzon: Rizal, Montalban, Nov-1908. = Impatiens pubisepala Hook.f. , Bull. Misc. Inform. Kew 1909 (1909) 284 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 520. = Impatiens quercetorum Hook.f. , Bull. Misc. Inform. Kew 1909 (1909) 284 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 520. = Impatiens elmeri Hook.f. , Bull. Misc. Inform. Kew 1909 (1909) 284 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 519; Type: BS 31916 J.K. Santos (NY, iso), Luzon: Benguet, Pauai, Apr/Jun-1919. = Impatiens mearnsii Hook.f. , Bull. Misc. Inform. Kew 1909 (1909) 284 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 520; Type: BS 3416 Mearns (US, iso), Luzon: Benguet, May-1907. = Impatiens burkei Hook.f. , Bull. Misc. Inform. Kew 1909 (1909) 283 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 519; ≡ Impatiens clemensae Hook.f. , Bull. Misc. Inform. Kew 1909 (1909) 283 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 519. = Impatiens merrillii Hook.f. , Bull. Misc. Inform. Kew 1909 (1909) 283 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 520.
species.distribution: Borneo, Java, Moluccas, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra. LUZON: Aurora, Benguet, Ifugao, Kalinga, Nueva Vizcaya, Rizal, MINDANAO: Agusan, Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon, Cotabato (photos), Davao, Davao Oriental, Davao de Oro (photos), Davao del Sur, Lanao, Misamis Occidental, South Cotabato (photos), Surigao del Norte, Surigao del Sur, Zamboanga del Norte, MINDORO, PALAWAN, PANAY, SAMAR.
species.notes: Damp forests and shaded streams, on limestone cliffs. 300-2400m.

species.distribution: Africa. LUZON: Quezon (photos), MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Misamis Oriental.
species.notes: Widespread at higher elevation in Bukidnon and Misamis Oriental were it is found in the forested slopes near waterways. Also found on Mt Banahaw (Luzon) (Derek Cabactulan, pers. comm. 5-Oct-15).
